title: Account Manager (Foreign), Global Commercial Banking
description:
At OCBC, we are constantly on the lookout for exceptional individuals to join our team. As Singapore’s second largest financial services group in Southeast Asia by assets and one of the world’s most highly-rated banks, with an Aa1 rating from Moody’s. Recognised for its financial strength and stability, OCBC Bank is consistently ranked among the World’s Top 50 Safest Banks by Global Finance and has been named Best Managed Bank in Singapore and the Asia Pacific by The Asian Banker. If you are a go-getter with high level of drive, do come and join our dynamic sales team today!

Key responsibilities:

The Cash Account Manager will be responsible for managing and enhancing client relationships by taking a proactive approach to understanding client needs, providing tailored solutions, and ensuring the highest level of service. This role is crucial for driving revenue growth by increasing bank deposits, nurturing customer relationships with a particular focus on foreign customers especially in the Chinese market.

The ideal candidate will have a strong background in cash management, excellent communication skills and a customer-centric mindset.

  • Client Relationship ManagementBuild and maintain strong relationships with clients to understand their needs and ambition
    Provide advice and support to clients on their banking requirements
    Conduct day-to-day account servicing and regular compliance review to ensure proper due diligence and KYC
    Identify and nurture high-growth Chinese customers to support their regional expansion and life cycle, and facilitate the transition to appropriate segments to ensure tailored services that match their evolving needs are met
  • Sales and Business Development:Responsible for building sales pipelines and delivering deposit and revenue KPIs
    Formulate and execute account plans for identified customers in assigned portfolio to increase share of wallet
    Collaborate with Product Partners such as Global Treasury (GT) and Global Transaction Banking (GTB) to recommend treasury products such as Foreign Exchange (FX), Investments and Cash management solutions

Qualifications:

  • University degree in any discipline with at least 3 – 5 years’ of working experience in banking or financial services
  • Articulate with strong communication and negotiation skills with the ability to engage and influence customers’ banking decisions
  • Strong experience in Cash Management Sales preferred
  • Highly driven and positively motivated
  • Proficiency in written and spoken Mandarin required

postedCompany.description:
The longest-established Singapore bank, we’ve been helping people and businesses get what they want from life since 1932. How? By taking the time to truly understand their needs. And it starts with looking after our people. With a motivated, purpose-driven culture. Looking after your well-being. Providing continuous holistic growth. 


Today, we are on a journey of transformation. Pioneering banking solutions with a future-ready mindset. Unleashing the creativity and ambition of our people though the largest-of-its-kind open-learning program. Harnessing the power of seamless data and technology to create first-to-market products and services. Partnering with sustainability innovators. Financing green technologies. Working in close-knit collaborative teams. Where you feel included and in complete control of your career growth. Now and into the future. 


We are recognised as one of the World's Top 50 Safest Banks by Global Finance. And the best-managed bank in Singapore and Asia Pacific by The Asian Banker. From this foundation of financial strength and robust technology, we serve 3.5 million people across Asia. Our footprint covers over 1,000 branches throughout Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, China, Hong Kong and Macao.  


Now it's time to launch your career at the forefront of banking. Whether you want to innovate needs-based financial services. Find the best version of yourself in a friendly, supportive team. Build lasting value in your community. Help people grow their assets, business, and investments. Take your learning as far as you can. Or simply enjoy a vibrant, future-ready career, your Opportunity Starts Here.
postedCompany.name: OVERSEA-CHINESE BANKING CORPORATION LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
